global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with bold text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a fast food app with a special offer.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text at the top stating 'CraveLoop' against the purple background.

elements.label: Body text description
elements.description: White text in the center reading 'Fast food, fast' with a modern font.

elements.label: Additional body text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main body stating 'Fresh favorites nearby'.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A prominent white text showing the price '€19.99' in the lower part of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bold white button with the text 'Install now' at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Three outlined circles in the center, possibly representing app features or options.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small circular element that appears to be a button or indicator.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Another small circular element similar to the previous one, adding to the design.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small rectangular element that adds visual interest to the ad.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small rectangular element positioned towards the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Secondary body text
elements.description: Text at the bottom that reinforces the main message, 'Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby €19.99 Install now'.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby €19.99 Install now

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand logo 'CraveLoop' displayed prominently at the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
